title: The `podman start --attach` command should not print ID
body:
Somewhere in the Podman v2 rewrite, we allowed `podman start --attach` to print the container ID of the started container after exiting from the attach session (via detach key or the container exiting naturally). We should never print the ID when `--attach` is given, which makes the fix simple - make the print statement conditional on `--attach` not being present.

Wierdly, this only happened with `--interactive` was given to `podman start`. I don't know why that is, but this resolves the issue without having to dig any deeper, so I'm content.

Fixes #7055
